title: 长时运行 Agent 的双段式 Harness 架构

body.overview: 单个 context window 无法完成复杂任务，需要多轮 session 协作。核心方案：用两类 agent 分工——初始化 agent 建立环境，编码 agent 逐步推进。

components.name: 初始化 Agent（Initializer Agent）
components.role: 首次运行时建立项目脚手架：生成 init.sh、功能清单文件、进度文件，并完成首次 git commit。只运行一次。

components.name: 编码 Agent（Coding Agent）
components.role: 后续每次 session 只做一件事：读取进度文件 → 实现一个功能 → 提交 git → 更新进度文件。循环执行直到完成。

components.name: claude-progress.txt
components.role: 跨 session 的状态桥梁。记录已完成的工作和下一步任务，让新 session 无需猜测当前状态。

components.name: 功能清单（Feature List）
components.role: JSON 文件，列出所有功能及其通过状态（passes: true/false）。防止 agent 过早宣告完成。

body.flow: 1. 用户输入高层需求 → 2. 初始化 Agent 展开成完整功能清单 + 环境脚本 → 3. 编码 Agent 每轮选一个 failing 功能实现 → 4. 测试通过后标记 passes: true + git commit + 更新进度文件 → 5. 下一个 session 读取状态继续

body_en.overview: Complex tasks span multiple context windows. The solution: split work between two specialized agents — an initializer that sets up the environment once, and a coding agent that makes incremental progress each session.

components.name: Initializer Agent
components.role: Runs once on first session. Creates init.sh, a feature list JSON, a progress file, and the initial git commit. Lays the foundation for all future sessions.

components.name: Coding Agent
components.role: Runs every subsequent session. Reads progress file → implements one feature → commits to git → updates progress file. Loops until done.

components.name: claude-progress.txt
components.role: The cross-session state bridge. Records completed work and next steps so each new session starts informed, not guessing.

components.name: Feature List (JSON)
components.role: Lists every feature with a passes: true/false status. Prevents the agent from declaring the job done prematurely.

body_en.flow: 1. User provides high-level prompt → 2. Initializer Agent expands it into full feature list + env scripts → 3. Coding Agent picks one failing feature per session → 4. Tests pass → marks passes: true + git commit + updates progress → 5. Next session reads state and continues
